This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
At the start of Boss Battles, gain {Death Resistance} equal to [Arg3]% of Horla's {Death Resistance} attribute. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, the corresponding {Emotion} effect of {Resplendent Chapters} +[Arg4]% until turn end.
